data.title: Wire check-shim-refs.sh into validate.sh and pre-commit hook
data.description:
Integrate check-shim-refs.sh into validate.sh and pre-commit hook (SC3, SC4).

## validate.sh Integration (SC3)
Add parallel check alongside existing check-skill-refs.sh call:
- Add run_check "shim-refs" line in the parallel check block (~line 847)
- Add report_check "shim-refs" line in the reporting block (~line 979)
- Exit code convention matches check-skill-refs.sh

## Pre-commit Hook Integration (SC4)
Add check to pre-commit hook that runs check-shim-refs.sh on staged files within plugins/dso/:
- Only run on staged files matching plugins/dso/**/*.md (instruction files)
- Script errors (non-blocking) vs violations (blocking) — per scenario analysis
- Pass staged file list as args to check-shim-refs.sh

## Also
- Remove .test-index RED markers for wiring tests

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] validate.sh contains shim-refs check
  Verify: grep -q "shim-refs" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes (no violations after remediation)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
- [ ] RED markers removed for wiring tests
  Verify: { grep "validate.sh.*test-check-shim-refs" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q "\["; test \$? -ne 0; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
